title: A Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal School Board Resolution No. 8 Entitled ?resolution Transferring the Special Education Fund Time Deposit Account Amounting to Three Million Three Hundred Sixty-eight Thousand Four Hundred Twenty-six Pesos & 73/100 Only (P 3,368,426.73) to Current Account with the Land Bank of the Philippines Uplb Branch, Los Baños, Laguna.
